section_miscategorizations.text: The patient had one polyp in the sigmoid colon in 2018, which was benign.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a past medical history / prior procedure result rather than a current exam, lab, or imaging finding at this visit.

section_miscategorizations.text: Stage 0 DCIS with positive ER and PR, invasive ductal carcinoma of the right breast.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Receptor status and histologic type are pathology findings; while restating them in the assessment is common, strictly by the provided semantics they belong to exam/imaging/lab results rather than diagnostic impression.
